versions.changelog_entry: 11-phase (A–K) plan covering the 6th-run review pair: DuckDB Parquet-pattern validation, FK PRAGMA, frozen Article with with_updates, write_json_artifact consolidation (11+ sites), velocity helpers, MonthKey NewType + iter_months_in_window, ConvergenceInput + per-window/permutation split, fetcher handler split, BOCPD factoring, DriftPipelineResult, forensics.paths relocation, scan_features LazyFrame, scrape dispatch dict, and 8 new unit-test modules lifting coverage 65 → 66.
